title: meridiana ringens
intro: Meridiana ringens, also known as Meriandra ringens, is a type of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties. The leaves and flowers of Meridiana ringens are rich in antioxidants and contain compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, offering various health benefits including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. The leaves and flowers can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional remedies for various ailments.
